task_description: Create a complete Harbor Terminal-Bench debugging task implementing an AST-based code transformation engine with 5 interacting bugs across rule loading, scope resolution, visitor state, transformation ordering, and cached depth invalidation.

verification.summary: NOP state: 4 easy tests pass, 6 medium+hard fail. Oracle state: all 10 tests pass. Bug E confirmed invisible until Bug B fixed. No BUG/FIXME/TODO/HACK. No 'pipeline'. Contains 'system-wide'. Custom .src format.
